title: Cherry Blossom GUI
description: A Cherry Grove biome inspired GUI !
body:
### _Hello :)_

Here is a pink GUI with some cherry branches I made ! The flowers are litterally based on the pink petals already present in Cherry Grove biomes.

The screenshots in the gallery are in French, but the color of the container titles are also **available in English.**

**Fabric and ModMenu are supported.**

Feel free to join my discord server so you can give your feedback :)

_Thank you, and see you soon !_
